overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white cloak walking through a misty golden-hour landscape. The character travels along a dirt path from open grasslands through autumn-colored trees toward ancient stone ruins, with the massive Erdtree glowing in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with wooden fencing and distant castle views

agents.ego_description: character in white cloak walking steadily along dirt path through grassy field with wooden fence to the right

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence running along the right side of the path
large stone castle ruins visible through the mist on the horizon
massive glowing golden tree towering in the far distance
cluster of bright orange and yellow-leaved trees ahead on the path
small red glowing flowers dotting the grass along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland bathed in golden hour light. A wooden fence lines the right side of the dirt path while the massive Erdtree glows in the misty distance. Scarlet rot flowers dot the landscape, and a distant castle looms on the horizon.

events.description: passing out of open field into denser tree cluster as wooden fence disappears

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the environment transitions from open field to wooded area with large rocks

entered.detail: large grey boulder formation appearing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open grassland into a denser area with golden autumn trees closing in overhead. The wooden fence falls behind as large rock outcrops appear on the right. The distant castle shifts to the left as the path progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded path flanked by ancient stone ruins

events.description: ancient stone ruins become visible on both sides of the path through the trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the tree line as stone ruins emerge from the mist on both sides of the trail

entered.detail: crumbling stone walls and foundations of ancient structures on the left side
weathered stone blocks and pillars lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path winds through dense golden foliage as ancient stone ruins emerge from the mist on both sides. The character walks between weathered stone walls and pillars while the Erdtree remains visible through the canopy ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone archway and narrow ruin corridor

events.description: entering narrow passage between stone ruins approaching a stone archway

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a stone archway as the path narrows between ancient walls

entered.detail: ancient stone arch spanning the path ahead, framing the Erdtree behind it
tall broken stone pillar on the right side of the narrowing path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor between ancient stone walls, approaching a stone archway that frames the distant Erdtree. The golden trees fall behind as the path becomes enclosed by weathered ruins and broken pillars.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open, golden-hour grassland that gradually narrows into a dense grove of autumn trees. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path lined by a wooden fence, with scarlet rot flowers dotting the landscape and the massive Erdtree glowing in the misty distance. As the character progresses, the open vista shifts and the wooden fence falls away, replaced by large rock outcrops appearing on the right. The scene then closes in as the golden autumn foliage begins to arch overhead, while the distant castle on the horizon gradually shifts toward the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a golden woodland that gradually narrows into a corridor of ancient stone ruins. It begins with the character winding through dense golden foliage, where weathered stone walls and pillars first emerge from the surrounding mist. As the character advances, the open canopy of trees begins to recede, shifting the environment from a natural forest to a more enclosed architectural space. The scene then tightens into a narrow passage between towering stone walls, moving toward a stone archway that perfectly frames the glowing Erdtree in the distance.
